out_of_scope_note: Pure multi-agent reinforcement learning / AI mechanism design paper. Constructs an outer-loop 'mechanism' agent that shepherds adaptive learning co-players (artificial agents and humans) toward institution-favorable outcomes. No neural recordings, no computational model of brain function, no perceptual/decision-making/encoding claim — economics/AI institutional-design content only. Out of lab scope per synopsis_prompt rules (social science / public-goods / collective-intelligence without neural data; pure-ML without biological neural content).
